ai_summary: Viceroy Hotels Limited is proceeding with a rights issue to raise up to Rs. 107 Crores, with specific terms (price, ratio, record date) to be finalized on July 3, 2026. A significant red flag is the explicit exclusion of the Promoter and Promoter group from participating in this issue, potentially signaling a lack of confidence or strategic disinterest. The absence of a stated purpose for these funds further adds to the uncertainty regarding its material impact on the company's financial health and future plans.
